title: Baseline Cyberware Pack
body: --- _Baseline is an addonpack for [Redline Cyberware](https://modrinth.com/project/redline-cyberware). Feel free to pick it apart to create your own Redline addon. **Since this is a base pack, no default recipes are installed.**_ ### Overview: Dive into a cutting-edge world of cybernetic enhancement with the Baseline Cyberware Pack - the foundational expansion for the Redline framework. Developed from the legendary technological archives of the [Landfall SMP](https://www.landfall.world/), this pack introduces a comprehensive suite of cybernetic systems that push the boundaries of human potential. ### Features: **Operating Systems** Overlord MK. 1 & 2: Entry-level systems with core functionality Echelon I-III: Progressive performance tiers for advanced users Dominion Core OS: Said to contain the consciousness of the late Emperor! **Cybernetic Components** Thermal Plating: Advanced heat resistance technology Plasma Palm: Integrated energy projection system Neural Overclock: Cognitive performance enhancement Hydraulic Tendons: Superhuman strength and mobility Dimensional Stabilizer: Portable ender chest Gravity Manipulator: Advanced gravitational control Impact Absorbers: Kinetic energy dissipation system **Modular Design** Customize your cybernetic loadout with a flexible, load-balanced system. Each component and OS offers unique capabilities and performance characteristics.
